name: Beehives
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine honey, egg and vanilla. Beat until well blended.
2. Stir in shredded coconut and chopped walnuts.
3. Coat the chopped dates with 2 tablespoons of flour.
4. Add the coated dates to the mixture.
5. Drop tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 325°F for 12 minutes or until done.
7. Yield: 2 1/2 dozen.
